reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to identify user and returned GitHub username after granting required access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Located and clicked the "QA-20260401-220527-4w4p" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened with landing message input.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Agent status displayed as "idle" with blue indicator in sidebar and header.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message entered in input field and sent via Send button.
Waited for agent processing and GitHub account access request — Agent entered "working" state and created session titled "GitHub Identity Verification Check".
GitHub account access request card appeared — Card displayed with GitHub account checkbox and Grant Access button.
Selected GitHub account checkbox — Checkbox marked as checked, Grant Access button enabled showing "Grant Access (1)".
Clicked Grant Access button — Access granted, agent resumed processing with status changed to "working".
API Request Review card appeared for GET /user — Card displayed with Allow, Deny, and Remember buttons for GitHub /user endpoint scopes (user, read:user).
Clicked Allow button on API Request Review — API request allowed, agent resumed processing.
Waited for agent response — Agent completed processing with status returned to "idle".
Verified response includes GitHub username — Agent returned "Your GitHub username is yiw190." indicating successful GitHub identity verification.
Took final screenshot documenting the response — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with GitHub username "yiw190" clearly displayed.
